headline: Reddit Reports Q4 2025 Earnings, Announces $1 Billion Share Repurchase Program
summary: Reddit announced its Q4 2025 earnings, reporting an EPS of $1.24, surpassing analyst expectations of $0.96, and revenue of $725.61 million, a 69.7% year-over-year increase. The company also announced a $1 billion share repurchase program.
why_it_matters: The strong earnings and share repurchase program indicate financial health and shareholder value enhancement, supporting a positive long-term investment thesis.

headline: Micron Technology to Report Fiscal Fourth Quarter Results and Full Fiscal Year 2025 on September 23, 2025
summary: Micron Technology announced it will hold its fiscal fourth quarter and full fiscal year earnings conference call on September 23, 2025, at 2:30 p.m. Mountain time, to discuss financial results and future outlook.
why_it_matters: The upcoming earnings report will provide insights into Micron's financial performance and strategic direction, which are crucial for assessing the company's long-term investment thesis.

headline: Rocket Lab Successfully Launches 61st Electron Mission, Second Launch for iQPS
summary: Rocket Lab successfully launched its 61st Electron mission, deploying the QPS-SAR-9 spacecraft for iQPS, marking the second launch for the Japanese customer.
why_it_matters: Demonstrates Rocket Lab's growing capabilities and reliability in the small satellite launch market, reinforcing its competitive position.

headline: Pony AI Inc. to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results on March 25, 2025
summary: Pony AI has scheduled its earnings release for Q4 and full year 2024, with a conference call on March 25, 2025.
why_it_matters: Upcoming earnings reports provide insights into the company's financial health and progress toward its strategic goals, informing long-term investment decisions.
